creator: pdagog@gmail.com
text:
Please, upgrade the ports for the just released 2.2.2 version of Netmagis.

Fix: 

The ports for this version are available on:
    http://netmagis.org/files/netmagis-freebsd-ports-2.2.2.tar.gz

The net-mgmt/netmagis-common/distinfo must be generated before commiting these ports.

Thanks in advance
